unified_frame_statement: Lisa shares her comeback story with Coach Marcus, showing how reframing failure as fuel helped her overcome business bankruptcy and build a thriving new venture.

state_alpha.internal_monologue: "I'm a fraud who got lucky once and blew it."
state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The knot in her stomach when seeing old business partners

the_spark.insight_quote: "He said 'Your failure is your MBA.' Something shifted inside." (09:18)

state_omega.action: Speaking about failure at entrepreneur events
state_omega.result: New business from $0 to $500K revenue in 18 months

sensory_anchors: The heavy silence in the courtroom during bankruptcy
The lightness after the reframe session
The confident posture when speaking on stage now
